description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the fedora:38 Docker image and a shared before_script that installs GeoIP-devel libmaxminddb-devel make meson ninja-build gcc libasan geolite2-{city,country} rubygem-ronn. Define two stages: generate and deploy. In the generate stage add six jobs: fedora.dyn_geoip runs meson setup build -Duse_maxminddb=disabled -Duse_geoip=enabled -Duse_runtime_linking=enabled --buildtype=plain -Dc_args="-O2 -g -Werror", then ninja -C build, ninja -C build test, and make with USE_GEOIP=yes USE_RUNTIME_LINKING=yes USE_MAXMIND=no CFLAGS="-O2 -g -Werror"; fedora.dyn_maxmind runs meson setup build -Duse_maxminddb=enabled -Duse_geoip=disabled -Duse_runtime_linking=enabled --buildtype=plain -Dc_args="-O2 -g -Werror", then ninja -C build, ninja -C build test, and make with USE_GEOIP=no USE_RUNTIME_LINKING=yes USE_MAXMIND=yes CFLAGS="-O2 -g -Werror"; fedora.dyn_maxmind_with_asan sets export ASAN_OPTIONS="detect_leaks=0", runs meson setup build -Db_sanitize=address -Dwerror=true, then ninja -C build test, and executes ./build/ipcalc -g 217.31.205.50; fedora.geoip runs meson setup build -Duse_maxminddb=disabled -Duse_geoip=enabled -Duse_runtime_linking=disabled --buildtype=plain -Dc_args="-O2 -g -Werror", then ninja -C build, ninja -C build test, and make with USE_GEOIP=yes USE_RUNTIME_LINKING=no USE_MAXMIND=no CFLAGS="-O2 -g -Werror"; fedora.maxmind runs meson setup build -Duse_maxminddb=enabled -Duse_geoip=disabled -Duse_runtime_linking=disabled --buildtype=plain -Dc_args="-O2 -g -Werror", then ninja -C build, ninja -C build test, and make with USE_GEOIP=no USE_RUNTIME_LINKING=no USE_MAXMIND=yes CFLAGS="-O2 -g -Werror"; fedora.nogeo runs meson setup build -Duse_maxminddb=disabled -Duse_geoip=disabled --buildtype=plain -Dc_args="-O2 -g -Werror", then ninja -C build, ninja -C build test, and make with USE_MAXMIND=no USE_GEOIP=no USE_RUNTIME_LINKING=no CFLAGS="-O2 -g -Werror". All generate jobs use the tag saas-linux-small-amd64. In the deploy stage add a pages job that installs lcov via dnf, runs meson setup build -Db_coverage=true -Duse_maxminddb=enabled -Duse_geoip=disabled -Duse_runtime_linking=enabled --buildtype=plain -Dc_args="-Og -g -Werror", then ninja -C build, ninja -C build test, ninja -C build coverage-html && mv build/meson-logs/coveragereport public, runs tests/run-coverage.sh, publishes the public/ directory as an artifact, and only runs on the master branch; also add a pages-test job with the same script that runs on all branches except master and also publishes public/. Include a coverage regex '/coverage lines: \d+\.\d+/' and use the same fedora:38 image for all jobs.
